rule: Verified chunk receipts record section-8 progress without treating partial progress as whole-file completion.

receipts.selected_candidate: Add an explicit section-20 execution-order matrix to the optimization audit.
rejected_candidates: Claim completion from final green checks alone
Keep execution order as prose only
preserved_invariants: PASS remains unavailable while protocol rows are REVISE
receipts.complexity_delta: adds explicit matrix rows; avoids implicit completion logic
risks: ledger is audit evidence, not proof of whole-project completion

receipts.selected_candidate: Add OPT-15 to prove the execution-order matrix is complete and ordered.
rejected_candidates: Rely on manual inspection of optimize-audit output
preserved_invariants: execution order cannot skip middle protocol steps
receipts.performance_delta: invariant suite adds one audit assertion
risks: project remains REVISE until later protocol rows pass

receipts.chunk_kind: python audit-ledger function and report-output cluster
receipts.selected_candidate: Add section-7 characterization-test receipts for merge and rewrite candidates.
rejected_candidates: Merge candidates before focused characterization tests
Leave characterization tests as a hard-coded execution-order blocker
preserved_invariants: no code merge without parity proof
mutation_allowed remains false for underspecified behavior
receipts.complexity_delta: adds focused proof rows before later rewrites
risks: queued tests are prerequisites, not completion proof

receipts.selected_candidate: Add OPT-16 to prove characterization rows block mutation until focused tests exist.
rejected_candidates: Trust audit JSON shape without an invariant
receipts.performance_delta: invariant suite adds one audit assertion
risks: candidate-specific tests still need later implementation

receipts.chunk_kind: python audit-ledger function and file-completion gate cluster
receipts.selected_candidate: Load committed chunk receipts and count verified entries as partial file-review progress.
rejected_candidates: Infer durable chunk completion from clean git status
Mark whole files complete from one changed chunk
preserved_invariants: strict audit rejects malformed proof receipts
secret-like content is rejected from ledger evidence
receipts.complexity_delta: adds a small durable receipt reader and file-gate link
receipts.performance_delta: audit reads one small JSON file; runtime path unaffected
risks: ledger receipt quality depends on future strict invariants

receipts.selected_candidate: Add OPT-17 to prove durable chunk receipts are well-formed and counted as partial progress.
rejected_candidates: Allow the ledger without an invariant
Treat ledger rows as whole-file completion
preserved_invariants: partial chunk progress remains distinguishable from PASS
receipts.performance_delta: invariant suite reads the optimization audit report
risks: whole-project completion still requires many pending chunk receipts

receipts.selected_candidate: Commit a durable section-8 receipt ledger for verified chunk optimization passes.
rejected_candidates: Keep chunk receipts only in narrative refinement prose
Generate uncommitted artifacts as the only proof source
preserved_invariants: no secrets, keys, prompts, completions, or private file contents are stored
ledger is evidence only and cannot authorize mutation
receipts.performance_delta: audit reads one small JSON file; runtime path unaffected
risks: ledger must remain summary-only and secret-free
